title: Set table view / widget to show subitems by default
excerpt:
Found lots of interest in this on the community, but can’t find an actual feature request - 

I’d like this feature to be available.

posts.author: KarenA (Karen Aiken)
posts.cookedHtml:
Found lots of interest in this on the community, but can’t find an actual feature request -

Expand subitems as default view Feature requests
Is there a way to keep subitems expanded when navigating away from a board and then returning? Seems like there should be a default setting or a view that could be saved to avoid having to re-expand every time.

I’d like this feature to be available.
